92 AB10D AB10D_MR_DD_EPI (AB10D) Epilepsy CHAR 1 Demographic information: conditions related to MR/DD status - MR/DD with organic condition - epilepsy. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
93 AB10E AB10E_MR_DD_OTH (AB10E) Other Organic Condition Related to MR/DD CHAR 1 Demographic information: conditions related to MR/DD status - MR/DD with organic condition - other organic condition related to MR/DD. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
94 AB10F AB10F_MR_DD_NO_ORG
